name: Indexed Particle Map Generation
description: Create a publication-quality indexed segmentation map of the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image. Identify particles with a size range of 10 to infinity, excluding those on the edges. Measure the Area, Circularity, and Feret's Diameter for each particle. Generate a flattened RGB map where every particle is outlined and numbered. Save the measurements to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/particle_data.csv and the labeled map to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/labeled_map.png.
